emptyState: No trees yet. Create your first genealogical tree to get started.

newTreeModal.title: Start a new tree
newTreeModal.subtitle: Give it a name and a starting point. You can add individuals, families and sources later.
newTreeModal.descriptionPlaceholder: A short note: lineage, region, research project…

start.meDesc: 1 root — a record with your name.

importModal.title: Import a GEDCOM file
importModal.subtitle: Drop a .ged file exported from Gramps, Ancestry, Geneanet, Heredis…
importModal.dropzoneTitle: Drop your file here, or click to browse
importModal.scanStatus_one: {{errors}} error · {{warnings, plural, one {# warning} other {# warnings}}}
importModal.scanStatus_other: {{errors}} errors · {{warnings, plural, one {# warning} other {# warnings}}}

options.mergeDuplicatesDesc: Detect individuals with similar names and dates.
options.mediaDesc: Photos and documents referenced (OBJE). If missing, links are kept.
options.livingDesc: Records without a death date stay confidential by default.

importModal.footNote: The original file will not be modified.

editModal.title: Edit tree
editModal.subtitle: Rename the tree and update its description. Records and sources stay unchanged.

downloadModal.title: Download tree
downloadModal.subtitle: Export a full copy of {{name}} to your machine.

formats.gedDesc: Universal standard — compatible with Gramps, Ancestry, Geneanet, Heredis. No media.
formats.jsonDesc: Native lossless format — keeps every Vata annotation and relation.
formats.zipDesc: GEDCOM + all linked media (photos, records, documents) in one archive.

downloadModal.versionHint: By default, Vata exports in 5.5.1 — the version most widely supported by genealogy software.

options.hideLivingDesc: Records without a death date are anonymised (name → «Living»).
options.privateNotesDesc: Notes flagged confidential in Vata. Uncheck if sharing.

deleteModal.title: Delete {{name}}?
deleteModal.subtitle: This action is permanent. All records linked to this tree will be lost.
deleteModal.exportBeforeDesc: Automatic download of a full tree copy (.ged).
